name: worksync
description: Automatic daily work-sync log — a PostToolUse hook captures gh pr/issue create/merge/close, and a companion skill lets Claude log research/ops/checkpoint events into a dated markdown note (great for feeding standups)

vault_dir.title: Worksync note directory
vault_dir.description: Absolute path to the directory where daily work-sync notes will be written. Examples: ~/Documents/Obsidian/<vault>/worksync, ~/Library/Mobile Documents/iCloud~md~obsidian/Documents/<vault>/worksync. Leave blank to use ~/worksync.
